title: HTTP Request node timeout exceeded
symptom: When executing a workflow with an HTTP Request node, n8n throws an AxiosError indicating that the timeout of 300000ms has been exceeded.
root_cause: The default timeout for the HTTP Request node is set to 300000ms (5 minutes). If the request takes longer than this duration, an AxiosError is thrown, indicating that the timeout has been exceeded.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request node settings
Select 'timeout' and set a higher value
agent_instruction: Increase the timeout setting in the HTTP Request node options.
